start.menu_prompt: What would you like to do?
compliance.intro: 📋 Before we continue, please complete a quick verification. This is required to proceed.
compliance.age: 🔞 Are you 18 years of age or older?
compliance.jurisdiction: 🌍 What is your country/region of residence?
compliance.responsible_gambling: ⚠️ Do you acknowledge that gambling carries risk and you should only gamble what you can afford to lose? Support: begambleaware.org
compliance.terms: 📄 Do you accept our Terms of Service? Read them here: {landing_url}
compliance.marketing: 📧 Would you like to receive promotional messages? You can opt out anytime.
compliance.confirmed: ✅ All set! You can now use the bot.
compliance.blocked: ⛔ We're sorry, but you must meet all requirements to continue.
menu.title: 🏠 Main Menu
error.generic: 😵 Something went wrong. Please try again later.
throttle.slow_down: ⏳ Please slow down. Try again in a moment.
referral.title: 🔗 Your Referral Program
referral.no_code: ❌ You don't have a referral code yet.
referral.share_hint: 💡 Share this link with friends. When they sign up and convert, you earn!
payment.already_paid: ✅ You already have access to this.
payment.expired: ⏰ The invoice has expired. Please try again.
payment.failed: ❌ Payment failed. Please try again or contact support.
payment.disabled: ⛔ Payments are not available at this time.
delivery.title: 🎁 Your Access
delivery.access_granted: ✅ Your access has been granted! Check below.
faq.what_is_bot: 🤖 This bot helps you discover a partner sportsbook offer and track referrals. We route you to one trusted offer and handle attribution automatically.
faq.is_it_safe: 🔒 Yes. This bot never holds your funds or accepts bets. We only route you to a verified partner. Always do your own research before signing up.
faq.language_change: 🌐 You can change the language anytime by typing /start and selecting a new language.
faq.how_to_pay: 💸 To purchase access: select an offer, and you'll receive a crypto invoice (TON or USDT). Pay via the provided link and your access is delivered automatically.
faq.payment_stuck: ⏳ If your payment seems stuck: 1) Wait a few minutes for blockchain confirmation. 2) Check your transaction status. 3) If still stuck after 30 min, tap 'Contact admin'.
faq.payment_expired: ⏰ Invoices expire after 24 hours. Simply select the offer again to generate a new invoice.
faq.how_referral_works: 🔗 Share your unique referral link (found in My Referral). When someone signs up via your link and converts, you're credited automatically.
faq.referral_not_tracked: 📊 Referrals are tracked via your unique link. Make sure your friends use YOUR link exactly. Clicks are attributed within a 30-day window.
faq.delivery_not_received: 🎁 If you didn't receive your access: 1) Check if your payment was confirmed. 2) Wait a moment for auto-delivery. 3) Tap 'Contact admin' if still missing.
faq.what_is_access: 📋 Access depends on the offer. It may be an affiliate link, a digital resource, or exclusive content. Check the offer details before purchasing.
faq.age_requirement: 🔞 You must be 18 or older to use this bot. This is verified during onboarding and cannot be bypassed.
faq.jurisdiction: 🌍 Availability depends on your jurisdiction. Some regions may be restricted. You self-attested your region during onboarding.
faq.responsible_gambling: ⚠️ Gambling carries risk. Only wager what you can afford to lose. If you need help, visit begambleaware.org. This bot provides NO gambling advice.
support.title: 💬 Support Center
support.intro: How can we help? Pick a category or type your question.
support.escalating: 📞 We're escalating your request to our team. You'll get a reply soon.
support.escalated_to_admin: 🔔 Escalated! Request #{request_id} is now with our team.
support.resolved: ✅ Glad we could help! Request closed.
support.closed_notice: ✅ Your support request has been closed.
support.no_match: 🤔 We couldn't find an answer for that. Let us escalate to our team.
support.attempt_exceeded: 📞 We'll connect you with our team now.
support.admin_reply_prompt: Reply to this message to respond to the user.
catalog.title: 📚 Available Offers
catalog.empty: No offers available right now. Check back soon!
catalog.not_compliant: ⛔ You need to complete verification first. Type /start to continue.
